languages.original_text: "What? This is inconceivable! That damned xenos must have violated the integrity of the logs. Nuncius, what has he done to you?"

languages.text: "Что? Это невообразимо! Должно быть проклятый ксенос нарушил целостность логов. Нунциус, что он с тобой сделал?"
"What? This is inconceivable! That damned xenos must have violated the integrity of the logs. Nuncius, what has he done to you?"

"What? This is inconceivable! That damned xenos must have violated the integrity of the logs. Nuncius, what has he done to you?"
"What? This is inconceivable! That damned xenos must have violated the integrity of the logs. Nuncius, what has he done to you?"

languages.text: «¿Qué? ¡Esto es inconcebible! Ese condenado xenos debe de haber alterado la integridad de los registros. Nuncius, ¿qué le ha hecho?».
languages.original_text: "What? This is inconceivable! That damned xenos must have violated the integrity of the logs. Nuncius, what has he done to you?"

traits.locale_text: «¿Qué? ¡Esto es inconcebible! Ese condenado xenos debe de haber alterado la integridad de los registros. Nuncius, ¿qué le ha hecho?».

languages.text: “什么？这绝不可能！那个该死的异形一定破坏了日志的完整性。努恩修斯，他对你做了什么？”
languages.original_text: "What? This is inconceivable! That damned xenos must have violated the integrity of the logs. Nuncius, what has he done to you?"

traits.locale_text: “什么？这绝不可能！那个该死的异形一定破坏了日志的完整性。努恩修斯，他对你做了什么？”

languages.text: « Quoi ? C'est inconcevable ! Ce maudit xénos a dû altérer l'intégrité des journaux. Nuncius, que t'a-t-il fait ? »
languages.original_text: "What? This is inconceivable! That damned xenos must have violated the integrity of the logs. Nuncius, what has he done to you?"

traits.locale_text: « Quoi ? C'est inconcevable ! Ce maudit xénos a dû altérer l'intégrité des journaux. Nuncius, que t'a-t-il fait ? »

languages.text: "Was? Das ist unfassbar! Dieser verdammte Xenos muss die Integrität der Protokolle verletzt haben. Nuncius, was hat er Euch angetan?"
languages.original_text: "What? This is inconceivable! That damned xenos must have violated the integrity of the logs. Nuncius, what has he done to you?"

traits.locale_text: "Was? Das ist unfassbar! Dieser verdammte Xenos muss die Integrität der Protokolle verletzt haben. Nuncius, was hat er Euch angetan?"

languages.text: え？信じられない！あの忌々しい異星人がログの完全性を侵害したに違いない。ヌンシウス、何をされたんだ？"
languages.original_text: "What? This is inconceivable! That damned xenos must have violated the integrity of the logs. Nuncius, what has he done to you?"

languages.text: "Ne? Bu akıl almaz bir şey! Kahrolası zeno, kayıtların bütünlüğünü ihlal etmiş olmalı. Nuncius, sana ne yaptı o?"
